page_metadata.biotools__summary: KinDOCK is a tool for the analysis of ATP-binding sites of protein kinases based on a structural library of protein kinase-ligand complexes extracted from the Protein Data Bank (PDB).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: KinDOCK is a tool for the analysis of ATP-binding sites of protein kinases based on a structural library of protein kinase-ligand complexes extracted from the Protein Data Bank (PDB).
